subsections.label: a
subsections.text: This chapter does not apply to:
a vehicle that is controlled and operated by a farmer and:

subsections.label: A
subsections.text: used to transport agricultural products, farm machinery, or farm supplies to or from a farm;

subsections.label: B
subsections.text: used within 150 miles of the person’s farm; and

subsections.label: C
subsections.text: not used in the operations of a common or contract motor carrier;

a fire-fighting or emergency vehicle necessary to the preservation of life or property or the execution of emergency governmental functions, whether operated by an employee of a political subdivision or by a volunteer fire fighter;
a military vehicle or a commercial motor vehicle, when operated for military purposes by military personnel, including:

subsections.label: A
subsections.text: active duty military personnel, including personnel serving in the United States Coast Guard; and

subsections.label: B
subsections.text: members of the reserves and national guard on active duty, including personnel on full-time national guard duty, personnel engaged in part-time training, and national guard military technicians;
a recreational vehicle that is driven for personal use;

a vehicle that is owned, leased, or controlled by an air carrier, as defined by Section 21.155 (Injunctive Relief) , and that is driven or operated exclusively by an employee of the air carrier only on the premises of an airport, as defined by Section 22.001 (Definitions) , on service roads to which the public does not have access;
a vehicle used exclusively to transport seed cotton modules or cotton burrs;
a vehicle, including a vehicle described by Section 504.502 (Certain Exhibition Vehicles) (i), that is:

subsections.label: B
subsections.text: driven by an individual not for compensation and not in the furtherance of a commercial enterprise; or
a covered farm vehicle as defined by 49 C.F.R. Section 390.5.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: In this section, “recreational vehicle” means a motor vehicle primarily designed as temporary living quarters for recreational camping or travel use. The term includes a travel trailer, camping trailer, truck camper, and motor home.

history.raw: Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 860 (H.B.2837), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2019.
